north_star_kpi: 100% lift in net financial position within 90 days (50% is extraordinary)
measurement_philosophy: The score is always: how much did Ruby Red's real financial life improve? Measured not just in dollars saved but in every dimension.

dimensions.name: Subscriptions Cancelled
dimensions.description: Dollar value of forgotten, unused, or overpriced subscriptions identified and cancelled through Vampire Slayer or Grace guidance
dimensions.measurement_method: Count cancelled subscriptions multiplied by their monthly cost

dimensions.name: NSF Fees Avoided
dimensions.description: Dollar value of non-sufficient funds fees prevented through Bill Tracker alerts and Grace proactive nudges
dimensions.measurement_method: Count of bill payment reminders sent before due date where payment was made on time, multiplied by average NSF fee ($35-50)

dimensions.name: Barter Value Gained
dimensions.description: Estimated dollar equivalent of goods and services exchanged through the Good Neighbor Barter system
dimensions.measurement_method: Count of completed barter exchanges multiplied by estimated market value of services exchanged

dimensions.name: Neighbor Economy Value Gained
dimensions.description: Dollar equivalent of community mutual aid received through Village Hands, HandUps, and Make a Wish
dimensions.measurement_method: Sum of: Village Hands help received (estimated market value), HandUp grocery boxes received (retail value), Make a Wish prizes won
dimensions.primary_feature: Village Hands + HandUps + Make a Wish

dimensions.name: Wisdom Giants Coaching Value Gained
dimensions.description: Estimated dollar equivalent of professional coaching and guidance received from Wisdom Giants
dimensions.measurement_method: Count of Wisdom Giant interactions multiplied by market rate for equivalent professional service (financial coaching: $100-200/hour, legal guidance: $200-400/hour)

dimensions.name: Expenses Reduced
dimensions.description: Dollar value of expenses reduced through Budget Builder optimization, Fee Fighter challenges, and Grace financial guidance
dimensions.measurement_method: Difference between pre-Maven monthly expenses and current monthly expenses, adjusted for income changes

dimensions.name: Debt Reduced
dimensions.description: Dollar value of debt principal reduced through Debt Snowball agent optimized payment sequencing
dimensions.measurement_method: Difference between starting total debt and current total debt, tracking interest saved through optimized payment order
dimensions.typical_range: $100-500 per month in accelerated debt reduction

dimensions.name: Emergency Funds Accessed
dimensions.description: Dollar value of emergency funds accessed through Milk Money and Chaos Support that prevented cascading financial crisis
dimensions.measurement_method: Sum of Milk Money and Chaos Support disbursements, weighted by crisis severity prevented

composite_score.name: Maven Financial Lift Score
composite_score.description: Single number representing total financial improvement since joining Maven. Displayed to Ruby Red as: 'This month, Maven helped you keep $X more in your pocket.'
composite_score.calculation: Sum of all 8 dimension values for the measurement period
composite_score.display_format: Single dollar amount — one number, not eight
composite_score.target_90_day: 100% lift in net financial position (50% is extraordinary)
composite_score.baseline_method: Capture Ruby Red's financial snapshot in first 7 days: total monthly income, total monthly expenses, total debt, total savings. Measure lift against this baseline.

conservative_estimate.notes: Conservative: Vampire Slayer not yet built, Barter not yet active, minimum engagement assumed

target_estimate.notes: Target: All features active, moderate engagement, barter system pilot running
